0x7f1bdd76.name: depositPool
0x7f1bdd76.reason: launchpad Commit — subscribe _amount of the raising LP token to pool _pid (0=Basic/capped, 1=Unlimited/overflow). Retail pre-sign sale action. selector keccak-verified (cast sig) + confirmed on the BscScan-verified IFOV2 instance.

0x2374876c.name: harvestPool
0x2374876c.reason: launchpad ClaimAllocation — claim the offering-token allocation for pool _pid AND receive the oversubscription overflow refund (minus tax) in one msg.sender call. Retail pre-sign. selector keccak-verified.

0x9f1b5248.name: finalWithdraw
0x9f1b5248.reason: onlyOwner admin sweep of raised LP + leftover offering tokens to the admin. Not a retail pre-sign action.

0x45b8bf91.name: setPool
0x45b8bf91.reason: onlyOwner pool config (offering/raising amount, per-user cap, hasTax, pid). Admin.
